creator: tg@ihf.rwth-aachen.de
text:
Brett Taylor <brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu> writes:

>  > 	Probably rename one of the targets.  I vote for renaming the teTeX
>  > 	version of mp, since I had never heard of it before.  Perhaps it
>  > 	could have its name expanded to 'metapost'.
>  
>  I suggested this too, but it's probably not a good idea for us to go
>  changing the distributed filenames...  Probably best to just do this
>  yourself.  (or use enscript)

This will be fixed in teTeX-0.9. The author of MetaPost has renamed
the binary to mpost because of this name clash. I'll probably commit a
similar fix for teTeX-0.4 when I get feedback from the maintainer.

tg
